title: Creamy Japanese Ramen
description: A twist on traditional Japanese ramen with a rich and creamy sauce.
instructions: Bring vegetable broth to a simmer in a large pot.
Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, combine cream and soy sauce (if using).
Bring cream mixture to a gentle simmer over medium heat.
Stir in cooked ramen noodles and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with sesame oil and serve hot.
Optional: add sliced green onions, bean sprouts, or pickled ginger for added flavor.
